narrative:
Columbiana County has 63,635 registered voters, with 58.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.4 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 32.0% of registrants.
